LanguageData.ForagingSpot.label: insect enclosure
LanguageData.ForagingSpot.description: This enclosure can house all sorts of insects, they can be coaxed out with different bait.
LanguageData.InsectLoom.label: cocoon silk loom
LanguageData.InsectLoom.description: A simple workstation used to turn featherwing cocoons into useable silk.
LanguageData.LeechSpot.label: leech pool
LanguageData.LeechSpot.description: A shallow pool for leeches to live in.
